ru.account_nav_info: Управление your data like your username and password
ru.alarm_ftp_info: FTP Server должен быть включён to trigger a movement through file upload!
ru.alarm_http_info: HTTP Server должен быть включён to trigger a movement through HTTP call!
ru.alarm_http_reset_info: HTTP Server должен быть включён to reset a movement through HTTP call!
ru.alarm_smtp_info: SMTP Server должен быть включён to trigger a movement through Email!
ru.analyze_duration_info: Specify how many microseconds are analyzed to probe the input. A higher value will enable detecting more accurate information, but will increase latency. It defaults to 5,000,000 microseconds = 5 seconds (-analyzeduration).
ru.appearance_nav_info: Изменить the language or the appearance of the interface
ru.atleast_one_permission_required: Atleast one permission должно быть выбрано
ru.audio_codec_info: Set the codec used for encoding audio sent to HomeKit for HSV, must be AAC-based (-acodec).
ru.audio_codec_info_hksv: Set the codec used for encoding audio for HKSV, must be AAC-based (-acodec).
ru.backup_info_download: Download a backup archive of your entire Nexus Core environment. This will backup the entire contents (including recordings) of your Nexus Core storage directory. You can restore this later on any platform on which Nexus Core is running
ru.backup_info_restore: Restore a backup archive you previously made using Nexus Core. Your Nexus Core config, database, recordings and Nexus Core user accounts will be restored
ru.backup_info_shedule: A full backup of the Nexus Core database is automatically created every day at 12:00:00 and kept for 7 days
ru.backup_nav_info: Создать and manage the backup copies from the interface
ru.bitrate_info: The bitrate used for video stream.
ru.bitrate_info_hksv: The maximum bitrate used HKSV, in kbit/s. If not set, will use any bitrate HomeKit requests (-b:v).
ru.camera_settings_save_info: Fields marked with (¹) can be saved only by clicking the "✓" button
ru.cameras_nav_info: Управление the streaming parameters of the cameras
ru.debug_info: Includes debugging output from the main FFmpeg process in the log.
ru.disable_info: Disables the camera and removes it from HomeKit.
ru.doorbellSensor_info: Exposes the doorbell device for this camera. This can be triggered with the dummy switches, MQTT messages, or via HTTP, depending on what features are enabled in the config.
ru.dwell_time_info: Dwell time means that after a Motion Detector is tripped it will need a N-seconds period in which it detects no motion in order to "reset" back to its default detection mode. This prevents the sensor from sending out multiple alerts for the same motion
ru.email_body_lookup_info: If Nexus Core can't find out the name of the camera by the email address, you can enter a term here so that Nexus Core can search the text content of the email for this term and thus assign the camera
ru.email_from_info: The email from address (without everything after @) to be assigned to this camera (e.g. my test camera. If not defined, the camera name will be used)
ru.email_to_info: The email to address (without everything after @) to be assigned to this camera (e.g. my test camera. If not defined, the camera name will be used)
ru.encoder_options_info: Options to be passed to the video encoder.
ru.encoder_options_info_hksv: Options to be passed to the video encoder for the HKSV recording process.
ru.excludeSwitch_info: Exposes a 'exclude' switch to HomeKit to exclude/include the camera from the interface settings within HomeKit.
ru.forceClose_timer_info: Timer in minutes that automatically interrupts (resets) the constant detection of motion after N minutes. 0 = Disabled. Attention: If the timer is deactivated, it is up to the camera WHEN the motion detection is considered "finished" and thus the recording is stopped. This can lead to very long recordings!
ru.forgotpw_content: If you have forgotten your password, you can restore it by deleting the database or importing a backup.
ru.fps_info: The fps used for video stream.
ru.fps_info_hksv: The maximum frame rate used for HKSV. If not set, will use any size HomeKit requests (-r).
ru.height_info: The height used for video stream.
ru.height_info_hksv: The maximum height used for HKSV. If not set, will use any size HomeKit requests (-s).
ru.help_started: To help you get started and provide good experience with Nexus Core, please complete the following configuration.
ru.homebridge_restart_info: Changing the fields marked with (²) requires restart of Homebridge
ru.interface_nav_info: Создать new rooms or make other settings
ru.label: Метка
ru.livestream_snapshot: Switches between live stream or snapshot interval
ru.loglevel_info: Show only defined log level (Info = Show informative messages during processing. This is in addition to warnings and errors - Debug: Show everything, including debugging information - Warning: Show only warnings and errors - Error: Show only errors)
ru.manufacturer_info: Set the manufacturer name for display in the Home app
ru.map_audio_info: Selects the stream used for audio (-map).
ru.map_video_info: Selects the stream used for video (-map).
ru.max_delay_info: When receiving data over UDP, the demuxer tries to reorder received packets (since they may arrive out of order, or packets may get lost totally). This can be disabled by setting the maximum demuxing delay to zero (-max_delay).
ru.max_streams_info: The maximum number of streams that will be allowed at once to this camera.
ru.model_info: Set the model for display in the Home app
ru.motionDoorbellSwitch_info: Enables dummy switches to trigger motion and/or doorbell, if either of those are enabled. When enabled there will be an additional switch that triggers the motion or doorbell event.
ru.motionDoorbell_info: Rings the doorbell when motion is activated. This allows for motion alerts to appear on Apple TVs.
ru.motionSensor_info: Exposes the motion sensor for this camera. This can be triggered with the dummy switches, MQTT messages, or via HTTP, depending on what features are enabled in the config.
ru.motion_timeout_info: The number of seconds after triggering to reset the motion sensor. Set to 0 to disable resetting of motion trigger.
ru.name: Имя
ru.notfound_message: Sorry, the page you're looking for doesn't exist.
ru.notification_text: @ detected a new movement in room %
ru.notifications_alert: You have a total of % notifications
ru.notifications_nav_info: Управление the Alexa, Telegram and Webhook settings
ru.page_not_found: The page you requested could not be found.
ru.pixel_difference_info: The color difference required to trigger motion on a pixel (the smaller the value the smaller the color difference and the larger the value the larger the color difference needed to register it as movement)
ru.press_enter_to_create: Press %Enter% to create a new label
ru.privacyMode_info: Turn off the camera feed and replace it with a privacy image in HomeKit
ru.privacySwitch_info: Exposes a 'privacyMode' switch to replace the camera feed with a privacy image in HomeKit
ru.probe_size_info: Set probing size in bytes, i.e. the size of the data to analyze to get stream information. A higher value will enable detecting more information in case it is dispersed into the stream, but will increase latency. Must be an integer not lesser than 32. It is 5000000 by default (-probesize).
ru.read_rate_info: Read input at native frame rate (-re).
ru.record_on_movement_info: Enables recording video (eg on movement) through UI and NOT through external controller.
ru.recording_text: The @ was taken on % by a #.
ru.recording_timer_not_editable: Recording time не может be edited. Settings can be changed in config.json.
ru.recording_type_not_editable: Recording type не может be edited. Settings can be changed in config.json.
ru.recordings_alert: You have % recordings in total and # recordings were selected
ru.recordings_nav_info: Управление the recording settings and specify the recording type
ru.rekognition_nav_info: Image analysis for motion detection via Amazon Rekognition
ru.remove_all_confirm_text: After clicking 'Remove all' all stored @ will be irrevocably deleted. Вы уверены?
ru.remove_camera_confirm_text: Вы действительно хотите delete the camera '@'?
ru.remove_camera_confirm_text_homebridge: Вы действительно хотите delete the camera '@'? This will also remove the camera from Homebridge!
ru.reorder_queue_size_info: Packets may be received out of order, so before they can be passed onwards, they need to be reordered. Default jitter buffer size is 500. This option allows you to specify it manually. Higher values will lead to greater latency. Only applicable for reception over UDP (-reorder_queue_size).
ru.reset_confirm_text: After clicking 'Reset' all stored data will be irrevocably deleted. Вы уверены?
ru.rss_feed_widget_info: Пожалуйста enter a valid RSS URL to see the feed in the widget.
ru.sensitivity_info: The percentage of pixels (see Differnce) required to trigger a movement (a low sensitivity means that more pixel differences have to be detected, a high sensitivity means that less pixel differences have to be detected)
ru.serialNumber_info: Set the serial number for display in the Home app
ru.shortcuts_widget_info: Пожалуйста select the action from the list to show it in the shortcuts.
ru.source_info: FFmpeg options on where to find and how to decode your camera's video stream. The most basic form is '-i' followed by your camera's URL.
ru.source_info_hksv: Here you can set a custom video source for HKSV recordings only.
ru.start_end_message:
And thats it.
Have fun with Nexus Core!
ru.start_info_message:
You must change your credentials
before logging in to Nexus Core
ru.still_image_source_info: If your camera also provides a URL for a still image, that can be defined here with the same syntax as 'source'. If not set, Nexus Core will grab one frame from 'source'.
ru.sub_source_info: Low Resolution Substream. FFmpeg options on where to find and how to decode your camera's video substream. The most basic form is '-i' followed by your camera's URL. The substream will be used to probe the stream or for motion detection through video analysis.
ru.system_nav_info: Управление the backend settings of Nexus Core
ru.telegram_type_not_editable: Telegram не может be changed for this camera.
ru.timeout_info: Socket TCP I/O timeout in seconds. If you have problems with hanging FFmpeg processes in the background, you can enter any value here to stop the process automatically after the entered time, if no response comes (-stimeout).
ru.unbridge_info: Bridged cameras can cause slowdowns of the entire Homebridge instance. If unbridged, the camera will need to be added to HomeKit manually.
ru.use_interface_timer_info: If enabled, the recording timer from Nexus Core will be used for "motionTimeout".
ru.users_nav_info: Удалить existing users or create new ones
ru.video_codec_info: Set the codec used for encoding video sent to HomeKit, must be H.264-based. You can change to a hardware accelerated video codec with this option, if one is available (-vcodec).
ru.video_codec_info_hksv: Set the codec used for encoding video for HKSV, must be H.264-based. You can change to a hardware accelerated video codec with this option, if one is available (-vcodec).
ru.video_filter_info: Comma-delimited list of additional video filters for FFmpeg to run on the video. If 'none' is included, the default video filters are disabled (-filter:v).
ru.videoanalysis_info: Activates Video Analysis for motion detection (a low resolution sub stream is preferred or prebuffering enabled)
ru.weather_widget_info: Пожалуйста search for your city name in English to activate the weather widget.
ru.weather_widget_info_owm: Weather data is provided by OpenWeather.
ru.width_info: The width used for video stream.
ru.width_info_hksv: The maximum width used for HKSV. If not set, will use any size HomeKit requests (-s).
